snapshot.description: Extend embedder config to support API-based providers (Ollama, Qwen3). Add auto-detection logic in onnx_runtime.go. Support OpenAI-compatible API endpoints for embedding generation.
snapshot.title: Add OpenAI-compatible embedding provider support (v0.21.0)
